overall.description: A third-person perspective shot following a character through a cyberpunk-style indoor venue. The character walks from a dark neon-lit corridor into a large concert hall with a brightly lit stage, moving through dense crowds of dancing NPCs. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity graphics and dramatic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk corridor with digital signage and neon floor lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dark corridor toward glass entrance doors

notable_agents.action: woman in turquoise top walking ahead of ego toward the entrance

entered.detail: large vertical screen displaying an animated face with pink and cyan lighting
glass double doors leading to the main venue with light visible beyond
pink and magenta neon light strips along the floor edge
dark concrete walls with industrial texture

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dark corridor illuminated by cyan and magenta neon lights. A large digital screen on the right wall displays an animated face. The character approaches glass doors at the end of the corridor, following a woman in a turquoise top.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance lobby transitioning from corridor to concert hall

events.description: passing through glass doors from narrow corridor into open concert venue
ambient lighting shifts from cyan neon to warm yellow stage lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance doors into the main venue space

entered.detail: elevated stage platform with performers visible in the distance
metal truss towers with lighting rigs flanking the stage
metal truss towers with lighting rigs flanking the stage
gathering of people moving toward the stage area

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the glass doors into a larger space, transitioning from the dark corridor to a concert venue. The lighting shifts dramatically from cyan neon to warm yellow stage lights. The stage becomes visible in the distance, framed by metal truss structures, as the character enters the moderate crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: concert hall floor with stage performance and dancing crowd

events.description: crowd density increases significantly as entering main dance floor area

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dense crowd toward the stage

notable_agents.action: patron dancing with arms raised near the stage

entered.detail: massive bright yellow LED screen backdrop illuminating the stage
silhouetted performers on stage visible against the bright backdrop

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the wide concert hall, surrounded by a dense crowd dancing to the performance. The stage dominates the view ahead with a massive yellow LED backdrop and visible performers. The lighting is bright and warm, contrasting with the dark corridor from earlier.

scene_state.functional_zone: front of stage with very dense dancing crowd

events.description: slowing pace to navigate through tightly packed crowd near stage front

agents.ego_description: moving through the dense crowd near the front of the stage, approaching the performance area

notable_agents.action: performer on stage dancing and engaging with the crowd

entered.detail: large black speaker cabinets flanking the stage
large black speaker cabinets flanking the stage

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the front area of the concert hall, very close to the stage. The crowd is extremely dense with many people dancing. Large speaker stacks are now visible on either side of the stage, and the performers are clearly seen against the bright yellow LED wall. The camera weaves slightly through the packed crowd.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, neon-lit corridor into the overwhelming brightness of a crowded cyberpunk concert hall. It begins in a narrow passage illuminated by cyan and magenta lights, passing a large digital screen while following a woman toward glass doors. As the character passes through these doors, the environment shifts dramatically from the dark corridor to a wide venue where the lighting transitions to warm yellow stage lights framed by metal truss structures. The scene then expands as the camera moves deeper into the hall, weaving through an increasingly dense crowd of dancing people toward a massive yellow LED backdrop. Finally, the movement culminates at the very front of the stage, where the view is dominated by large speaker stacks and performers against the brilliant glow of the LED wall.
